answer_en:
Head of humerus
located superiorly
directed medially (articulates with the glenoid fossa of the scapula)
Olecranon fossa
located posteriorly
(there are two fossae anteriorly)

details: directed medially (articulates with the glenoid fossa of the scapula)

title: Posterior View of Humerus (Right Side)
